name: Civil Damages for Failure to Release Lien

eligibility.description: Requires exhaustion of administrative remedies within the IRS and a filing within 2 years of the right of action accruing.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers may recover actual, direct economic damages and costs if the IRS knowingly or negligently fails to release a lien on property under section 6325.
